venues.name: The Restaurant
venues.description: Main dining room open for breakfast, lunch, and dinner with open-seating service. Daily-changing menu features contemporary cuisine; complimentary caviar available on request at dinner. Complimentary.

venues.name: The Colonnade
venues.description: Casual indoor/outdoor restaurant on Deck 8 aft. Buffet breakfast and lunch daily; regionally themed dinner service with table service in the evenings. Complimentary.

venues.name: The Patio Grill
venues.description: Poolside deck grill serving casual lunches: burgers, grilled seafood, salads, and light bites. Open most afternoons at sea. Complimentary.

venues.name: The Grill by Thomas Keller
venues.description: Signature chophouse restaurant added during Quest's 2019 refit. Classic American steakhouse menu by chef Thomas Keller featuring prime beef, Dover sole, and signature sides. Premium supplement applies; reservations required.

venues.name: Seabourn Square
venues.description: The social hub of the ship on Deck 7, serving specialty coffees, pastries, sandwiches, and light snacks throughout the day. Concierge services also available here. Complimentary.

venues.name: In-Suite Dining
venues.description: Complimentary 24-hour in-suite dining for all guests. Full Restaurant menu available during dinner hours; breakfast, lunch, and snack menus throughout the day.
